Looney Labs Star Trek Fluxx - Best Card Game Fun Card Games for Adults Teens Kids Family Games Coolest Gifts for Boys and Girls Kids Games Family Board Games 2-6 Players Ages 8 to Adult 100 Cards
['Looney Labs Star Trek Fluxx', 'Card Games for Families', 'Set a course for the final frontier with Star Trek Fluxx! Featuring Kirk, Spock, McCoy and the rest of the original series crew. You will take command of the Enterprise, and face Creepers like Klingons, Romulans and the terrifying Doomsday Machine! You might even find yourself playing Fizzbin or Venting the Warp Core to explore new worlds and collect Keepers needed for victory! Star Trek Fluxx will take you where no card game has gone before! Expand the fun by combining the card deck with other series from the Star Trek Fluxx line including The Next Generation, Voyager or Deep Space Nine. You can also buy the following expansion packs: Archer, Porthos and Bridge.', 'Best Family Games', 'Fluxx begins with one basic rule: draw one card, play one card. As the game goes on New Rules, Actions and Surprise cards come into play. With rules that are constantly evolving, Star Trek Fluxx keeps players in flux throughout the game. You never know what might happen! New Rules change the way the game is played, Actions shake up your turn and Creepers prevent victory. This version also allows players to win in a new way. The "he\'s Dead Jim" goal requires a red shirt to be in the discard pile. Star Trek fans will love playing with familiar characters and objects from the movie. Made for 2-6 players, ages 8 to adult.', 'About Us', 'We are the creators and sellers of fun card games, board games and family games for game night. Fluxx is our best-known game, but we make many other booster and expansion packs, merchandise and gaming supplies. Our games are fast, unpredictable and fun because all players have the chance of becoming champions right up until the moment that someone actually wins. We create new ways of playing in the old-fashioned face-to-face way so you can sit around the table with family and friends to connect, laugh and have an adventure together.']
['Star Trek Game - Set a course for new frontiers! With Star Trek figures you know and love! Take command of the Enterprise and face Creepers like Klingons and the Doomsday Machine! Star Trek Fluxx will take you where no card game has gone before!', 'Family Card Games for Kids and Adults - Made for 2-6 players from the age of 8 years old and up. Playtime ranges from 10-40 minutes. Each box contains 100 playing cards and game instructions. Great gift for a birthday, Christmas or stocking stuffer.', 'Wish List - Toys, board games and card games make the best gift for a boy or girl. Kids, teens and adults can get in on the magic of Fluxx. This engaging game never plays the same way twice! Things stay fresh and new each time you play!', 'Fun Family Games - Switch the game up by mixing this deck with the Star Trek: TNG Fluxx deck or Bridge Expansion Pack. An amazing game for any social gathering, family game night, kids card games, adult games, couple games, party games and more.', 'Fun Games for Family Game Night - Fluxx is an Evergreen title with over 3 million units sold! This edition of Fluxx includes Creepers, Surprises and a new way to win: the "he\'s Dead Jim" goal requires a red shirt to be in the discard pile.']

['Product Description', 'Enjoy a "home away from home" with this delightful wooden dollhouse. Two flexible wooden play figures live in this house with 11 pieces of wooden furniture. The Fold & Go Mini Dollhouse is a creative and thoughtful gift for kids ages 3 to 6. Add the Melissa & Doug Poseable 7-Piece Wooden Doll Set to round out the pretend play experience and give kids an engaging option for screen-free fun. For more than 30 years, Melissa & Doug has created beautifully designed imagination- and creativity-sparking products that NBC News called “the gold standard in early childhood play.” Today, Melissa & Doug is proudly partnering with the American Academy of Pediatrics to foster early brain development and help children build important life skills through play.', 'From the Manufacturer', 'From classic wooden toys to crafts, pretend play, and games, Melissa & Doug products provide a launch pad to ignite imagination and a sense of wonder in all children so they can discover themselves, their passions, and their purpose. ['The Hisonic portable PA (public address) system PA-687S includes a 80 watts powered speaker, a dual VHF wireless microphone system and one tripod speaker stand. It has everything you need for your sound amplification applications. No extra equipment to purchase! Open the boxes, plug them in and switch them on, let the show begin! The 8-inch speaker is rated at 80 watts continuously with a 150 watts peak power, it has a standard 1/4" microphone input jack where the speaker will be connected to the receiver of the wireless microphone system. The VHF dual wireless microphone system comes with two belt-pack transmitters and two hand-held microphones, the two VHF belt-pack transmitters come with two lapel microphones & two headset microphones. You can use any combination of two microphones at the same time without interferences. In order for your audience to enjoy the sound amplification to its fullest, it\'s very important to install your speaker at the proper height. That\'s where the speaker stand comes into play. It can effectively double the power output from your speaker in a large room by improving clarity and coverage. Conservatively rated at 95 LBS weight on the center tube, The Hisonic speaker stand is adjustable from 43 inches to 81 inches, its non-slip rubber feet spread from 32" to 44", giving listeners an array of heights from which to choose. All metal surfaces are finished in flat black powder coat for long lasting good looks. Designed and engineered with precision construction, it offers perfect balance, durability and light weight and allows maximum flexibility for quick, easy, and portable operation.']

Seymour Duncan SH-18 Whole Lotta Humbucker Electric Guitar Pickup Black Neck
['SH-18 Whole Lotta Humbucker Electric Guitar Pickup Black Neck. In his youth, Seymour Duncan spent time in London and aided fellow young guitar players with defining their sound through pickups. This wouldn\'t be much of a story if one of these lads didn\'t go on to change the world! Seymour\'s special rewound PAFs went into a Les Paul and captured a sound that blasted through a Marshall stack and into history. These same pickups are now available as the SH-18 Whole Lotta Humbucker. The recipe for these pickups starts with a rough cast Alnico 5 magnet, plain enamel wire, and Seymour\'s unique wind pattern. The bridge is a hotter-than-vintage 8.78k DC resistance and the neck is similarly beefy at 8.2k. Tonally, the rough cast magnets add warmth and balanced note-to-note clarity so everything sounds bigger. What is sonically unique about the Whole Lotta Humbucker pickups is the way that they push your amp and add a very slight natural compression and sustain to your playing. Complete Setup Use the Whole Lotta Humbucker set for the "original" sound or try the bridge with an Alnico 2 magnet neck pickup, like the Pearly Gates (sold seperately), for a distinct in-between position tone. Utilize the 4-conductor cable on each pickup with push/pull pots or mini-switches for complete flexibility. Choose from nickel or black bridge or neck position pickups (in the pull down menu bar).']
['For use in any mahogany or warm-toned solid body guitar with a rosewood fingerboard for the "original" sound', 'Moderate output', 'Hum cancelling', 'DC Resistance:', 'Neck: 8.2k']

Audio-Technica System 10 ATW-1101/H92-TH Wireless Beige Headworn Microphone System
['Audio Technica’s System 10 is a digital high fidelity wireless system designed to provide performing musicians and presenters with advanced 24 bit operation, easy setup and clear, natural sound quality. Operating in the 2.4 GHz range, far from TV and DTV interference, System 10 offers extremely easy operation and instantaneous channel selection. Up to eight channels may be used together without any frequency coordination problems or group selection issues. System 10 receivers and transmitters offer an easy to read digital ID display. System 10 wireless ensures clear communications by providing three levels of diversity assurance: frequency, time, and space. Frequency Diversity sends the signal on two dynamically allocated frequencies for interference free communication. Time Diversity sends the signal in multiple time slots to maximize immunity to multipath interference. Finally, Space Diversity uses two antennas on each transmitter and receiver to maximize signal integrity. Featuring stackable, contemporary styling, System 10 is available in multiple system configurations, with handheld vocal microphone/transmitters and UniPak body pack transmitters designed for use with lavalier, headworn and instrument microphones as well as electric guitars. Each configuration includes the ATW R1100 receiver and either a body pack transmitter or handheld microphone/ transmitter. The ATW R1100 is a digital receiver offering volume control along with AF Peak and Pair indicator lights.']

['From the award-winning creators of the best-selling games, Exploding Kittens and Throw Throw Burrito, A LITTLE WORDY is a fresh take on the genre of word-unscrambling games. Rather than being another game of who has the biggest vocabulary? A Little Wordy requires players to assemble a word from a set of tiles and keep that Secret Word to themselves. Each player then takes turns trying to decipher each other’s Secret Word by asking for clues and hints. You and your opponent are each given a pile of letters. Rearrange the letters in your pile until you come up with a word. Keep this word a secret. Scramble your letters and swap them with your opponent. Take turns trying to decipher each other’s Secret Word by asking for clues and hints.']

['T-Maxx has become the world\'s best-selling Ready-To-Race nitro monster truck by climbing, jumping, and ripping through terrain that others simply wouldn\'t attempt. The TRX 3.3 racing engine makes broad, linear power practically anywhere in the RPM range. Brutal torque rips massive wheel-standing launches to soar past 45mph! Traxxas Stability Management allows arrow-straight acceleration on slippery surfaces, without fishtailing, spinouts, or loss of control. The large dual-stage air filter increases air flow to the TRX 3.3 racing engine, breathing in even more horsepower and torque. The Resonator dual-chamber Maxx pipe provides increased torque across the entire RPM range. The T-Maxx 3.3 is the biggest Maxx ever. Giant Maxx tires deliver increased ground clearance and massive grip to gobble up deep ruts and overcome boulders. Maxx tires come pre-glued to 3.8" Mirror-Chrome Hurricane wheels. The extended wheelbase chassis is formed from 4mm thick 6061-T6 aluminum and then anodized in brilliant blue. Meaty chassis braces and a rugged skid plate add rigidity. The TQi 2.4GHz transmitter comes equipped with a Bluetooth module that turns your Android, iPad iPhone or iPod touch (sold separately) into a powerful tuning tool. Download Traxxas link and the factory-installed telemetry sensors collect and record real-time telemetry data as you drive. Up to nine customizable gauges keep you in tune with the performance of your vehicle. The T-Maxx 3.3 is equipped with a forward-only, auto-shifting, two-speed transmission. Extra-wide gears and steel components add strength to handle extreme TRX 3.3 power. Revo Spec center drive shafts and sealed differentials are overbuilt to handle driveline. The T-Maxx 3.3 is easy to start with the EZ-Start push-button starter and included battery with charger. The T-Maxx 3.3 is built Traxxas Tough and backed by a team of pros who can get you up and running with a simple phone call or email.']

Balalaika, Prima
['Our Balalaika Prima measures approximately 27 inches in length. The scale length is 430 mm. The body has the classical triangular shape. The back is slightly bowed and made with stave construction in two tones of rosewood. The darker back contrasts with the light colored wood of the soundboard. Each instrument is individually hand made so shades and colors may vary slightly from photo. The Balalaika strings are tuned above middle C to: A, E, E (1st-3rd). The 1st string is the thinnest, and lays over more frets than the 2nd & 3rd strings. Use a piano or electronic tuner as a reference for tuning. To play, the left hand notes the strings while the index finger of the right hand strums high on the soundboard near the neck. The dark rosewood on the soundboard is decorative but also protects the soundboard from the strumming.  NOTE; No Warranty on Strings: Manufacturers recommend that you change the strings on your instrument as soon as you receive it. Your instrument has completed a long journey before it ever begins the final leg to your home. During this time the elements affect the strings and may shorten their lifespan. It occasionally happens that a string will fail during that final leg of the journey. Therefore, it is recommended that you purchase a replacement set of strings and consider changing your strings soon after it arrives. ["Save Rinona from the Mammoth's awesome fortress! Release Rinona from the Mammoth's Frozen Stronghold with rotating disc shooter, Mammoth Tusk Flipper, frozen prison turret and more! Rush to rescue her with Rogon in his powerful Rhino Roller, but beware-the Mammoths are well-equipped to defend their icy fortress. The Mammoth Tusk Flipper vehicle features a ramming function, 2 flick missiles and mammoth tusk elements. Rogon's Rhino Roller features a cockpit, big wheels, flick missiles and a rhino horn element. Dholak, Nut and Bolt
['Wooden two-headed drum. Heads held in place and tuned by bolts. Held horizontally, both heads are played with the hands (no beaters). In India, these extremely popular percussion instruments are commonly used in folk music and during marriage ceremonies. The shells are manufactured in the northern Indian State of Uttar Pradesh. There locally grown neem and rosewood are used. After transporting to Mumbai the goat skin heads are fitted to the drum shells with nut and bolts for easy tuning.Each drum will vary, approximate measurements:Approximately 17.5 inches long (444.5 mm), base head has a load inside and is 8.5 inches (215.9 mm), tenor head 6.5 inches (165.1 mm)The Load in the bass head is a mixture of tar, clay and sand (dholak masala) which lowers the pitch and provides a well-defined tone.']

Seymour Duncan TS-2 Triple Shot Carved Top Pickup Mounting Ring Cream Neck
['The Seymour Duncan TS-2 for Les Paul Neck Humbuckers allows you to expand your tonal palette by accessing three unique tones from a humbucker, thanks to the TS-S mounting ring that holds two small switches. For use with nearly any humbucker pickups with four-conductor cable on Les Paul guitars, Seymour Duncan or otherwise. This "stealth" pickup switching device allows you to access series, parallel and split wirings with a standard humbucker. And it\'s easy to install. Just solder your pickup leads to a small color-coded circuit board. That\'s it. Push the two switches towards each other for standard series wiring; away from each other for parallel wiring; and both towards one coil (either one) to shut that coil off. Specifications Inside: 2.780 x 1.470 inches Outside: 3.54 x 1.78 inches Pickup mounting hole spacing: 3.076 inches on center Trim ring mounting hole spacing: 3.20 x 1.513 inches on center Height: 0.200 inches (ring), 0.328 inches (switch casing) Circuit board: 1.353 x 0.402 inches Soundboard radius: 43.5 Note: Will not fit Nickel and Gold covered Trembuckers.']

A type of corrective lens worn in only one eye and introduced to society as early as the 1720's to help people see sophisticated things such as maps or documents. In the 1830's these fashion items began to increase in popularity and became a stereotype of high society, capitalist gentlemen. Monocles were most prevalent in the late 1900's but are rarely worn today due to the increased technology and precision of contact lenses and glasses. However, monocles are beginning to make their come back with the rise of Steampunk. The monocle was to the wealthy gentlemen of the 1900's as the monocle is to the sophisticated connoisseur of Steampunk today. In other words, it's important and a symbol of that popular style. Xotic Effects SL Drive Distortion Guitar Effects Pedal
["SL Drive Distortion Guitar Effects Pedal. Famous for its woody, organic and beautiful sounds of saturation, these legendary British amplifiers, the Super Lead & Super Bass, have been delivering one of the all-time classic sounds for almost 50 years. Players like Jimmy Page, Paul Kossoff and countless other relied on this type of tone for their signature sound. Xotic have recreated this vintage masterpiece in a rugged small enclosure. The SL Drive offers very amp-like response and cleans up nicely with a roll of your guitar's volume knob. The internal dip switches allow you to choose the sound characteristics of both 1959 models. The Super Lead setting offers a brighter tone with more gain, while the Super Bass setting has more low end with less high end. Its compact design conforms nicely to the smallest space on any pedal board. The SL Drive is equipped with true bypass switching and eliminates any signal interference when switched off. Power requirements are either 9V battery or AC adapter (optional)."]

Former IHC executive and former IH dealer Paul Wallem provides an insider\'s look at how a perfect storm of problems killed the iconic brand. Successes and Industry Firsts 1940-1980 The legacy of International Harvester often focuses on the lasting memories of the distinctive red farm machinery. Collectors and restorers have done remarkable work in keeping the IH brand alive. This book, from best-selling author of The Breakup, Paul Wallem, shines a light on the many successful products developed by IH between 1940-1980, some that were "industry firsts." Included are never before published photos and stories about the design and development of IH products, including the top-secret Axial-Flow combine project.']

['Product Description', 'Enter a galaxy of adventure and imagination with Star Wars toys! ['Forget the messy pottery wheel—we’ve got an even easier way to create custom bowls and dishes: It’s the Made By Me! Sand Dough Sculpt & Paint Creations Pottery Press! Say goodbye to clay and hello to Sand Dough, a simpler, mess-free material to make pottery that’s unique to you! It’s as easy as rolling a ball of dough, dropping it into the mold base, and pulling down the handle press—voila! The pottery press comes with 2 press tools to make different shaped projects—and with over 2 pounds of Sand Dough, you’ll have enough to make several! Once your bowls are completely dry, use the included paintbrush and 12 vibrant paints to decorate your custom pottery! Paint the inside a solid color and the outside a contrasting shade—or get wild and crazy with designs like stripes and polka dots. Maybe you’ll paint a rainbow, or even your name—the choice is yours! Give your pottery a little sparkle by adding glitter glue to your designs, or use the tools to sculpt and carve patterns—just don’t forget, these dishes are for decoration only, so don’t eat out of them! Use them in pretend play with dolls (tea party, anyone?!) or as a jewelry holder on your dresser. Personalized pottery created especially by YOU makes a beautiful keepsake for parents, grandparents, teachers and more. Recommended for pottery lovers ages 6 and up.']

Mattel Monster High Boo York, Boo York Gala Ghoulfriends Elle Eedee Doll
['With the promise of extra-bright lights in the big city, the Monster High ghouls are heading to Boo York City in their first musical, Monster High Boo York, Boo York! There, they hope to witness the historic passing of the Crystal Comet at a hair-raising gala and monster skull-ebration. Their adventures introduce them to new beast friends carving their way in the big city: Luna Mothews, daughter of the Moth Man; Mouscedes King, daughter of the Rat King; and Elle Eedee, daughter of The Robots. Each wears her fiercest fashion and out-of-this-world accessories for the gala event that will skull-ebrate the comet’s passing. Music-loving Elle Eedee doll sticks to clean lines in a futuristic dress designed in metallic purple and black with riveting print. A dramatic cape with its own sleek print and a silvery punk belt are to-die for, while bright blue shoes and a matching headpiece are fabulously shocking. Use the doll stand and doll hairbrush to style the gore-geous dolls for a flawesome moment. Plus, a diary with character info adds to the fun. For a full cast of ghoulish characters, collect all of the Monster High Boo York dolls (sold separately)! Includes Elle Eedee doll wearing fashion and accessories, a doll stand, doll hairbrush and diary with character info. Doll cannot stand alone. Colors and decorations may vary.']
